prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.0L 3S-GTE (Gen 3) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL Race bearings) and a Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.64 A/R turbine housing) for 350+ hp at 22 psi on E85 fuel, paired with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU and a Tomei 260° camshaft kit (intake/exhaust) for optimized spool and top-end power

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Burns Stainless 4-2-1 header (equal-length primaries) and a custom 3.5-inch straight-pipe setup terminating in a Fujitsubo Giken Type-S muffler for aggressive JDM van acoustics, paired with a custom intercooler setup (GReddy Type-S front-mount core, 600x300x76mm) and a HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve

Chassis reinforcement with a custom bolt-in roll cage (Autopower Industries, 1.75-inch DOM tubing) and a full polybush kit (SuperPro 60mm engine mounts, transmission mount, and differential bushings) to handle the increased torque, paired with a KAAZ 2-way mechanical LSD (25-spline) and a custom driveshaft (Driveshaft Shop, 3.5-inch aluminum) for durability
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny TownAce-specific widebody kit (Pandem Designs, fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated tow hooks, and a rear diffuser) paired with a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 30% weight reduction) and a custom rear spoiler (Voltex Type-3, 3-piece adjustable)

Custom suspension setup with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV, 8-position damping adjustability) and custom extended top mounts (BC Racing) for a 3-inch drop, paired with custom 17x9.5 ET0 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (gunmetal finish) wrapped in Toyo R888R 225/40/17 tires for optimal grip and stance

Full JDM-inspired interior overhaul with a Bride Gias II reclining bucket seat (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and a custom bolt-in Sabelt 6-point harness bar, paired with a custom Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a full custom dashboard (carbon fiber overlay, Defi Advance BF gauges for boost, oil pressure, and EGT monitoring)
